upasargachandrika.example_text: 'AcAntaH punarAcAmet' (go0 gf0 1237) AN IzadarTe Izad Bakzayet aSnIyAt
'te hayA vAsudevasya dArukeRa pracoditAH panTAnamAcemuriva grasamAnA ivAmbaram' (BA0 u0 8359).. panTAnamatitvaritA atyakrAmannityarTaH
